mean_en: connected with the inside of your body; connected with the inside of something; connected with a country’s own affairs rather than those that involve other countries;
sentence: I found internal peace by listening to soft music.
sentence_trans: 我可以通过听轻音乐找到内心的平静。
word_etyma: intern=inter在…之内 + al属于...的 → internal内的；国内的
